message:
Refactor parse_winlog_msft tests into separate files

Split the monolithic parse_winlog_msft.tql test into individual test
files in a new msft/ directory, one per Windows event type:
- 4624-logon.tql
- 4625-failed-logon.tql
- 4627-group-membership.tql
- 4648-explicit-credentials.tql
- 4688-process-creation.tql

Each test now uses `from_file` with `read_all` to load test data.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+// Event 4624: An account was successfully logged on
+// Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/security/threat-protection/auditing/event-4624
+from_file f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/winlog/4624-logon.xml" {
+  read_all
+}
+this = data.parse_winlog()

@@ -1,23 +0,0 @@
-// Test parse_winlog with real Windows Event Log examples from Microsoft documentation.
-// Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/security/threat-protection/auditing/
-from {
-       // Event 4624: An account was successfully logged on
-       x: file_contents(f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/winlog/4624-logon.xml")
-     },
-     {
-       // Event 4625: An account failed to log on
-       x: file_contents(f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/winlog/4625-failed-logon.xml")
-     },
-     {
-       // Event 4627: Group membership information
-       x: file_contents(f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/winlog/4627-group-membership.xml")
-     },
-     {
-       // Event 4648: A logon was attempted using explicit credentials
-       x: file_contents(f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/winlog/4648-explicit-credentials.xml")
-     },
-     {
-       // Event 4688: A new process has been created
-       x: file_contents(f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/winlog/4688-process-creation.xml")
-     }
-this = x.parse_winlog()
